target: 48. Battle with the Shadow
(At the end of the hidden stairs leading underground, which we descended carefully...)
(A much larger space than expected awaited us.)
Is this... an underground bunker?
I've heard there are several bunkers on this island that were dug during the war, but...
(A Japanese military underground bunker... A sealed entrance... Probably no one has entered for decades.)
(...No, a path meant only for Shadows!?)
Ushio, is there any presence of Shadows!?
...Over there...
How many?
I don't know... I'm getting chills... A completely awful atmosphere...
Are we really going to keep going!?
We have to go. Towards the direction we don't want to go...!!
...Yeah.
Before that, listen to me, both of you.
...If we get into a fight, and end up in a situation we can't get out of—
Ushio, protect only yourself. And Sou, focus all your efforts on protecting Ushio.
Wh-What are you saying... You saw my power, didn't you!? I'm going to protect you guys!!
Listen!! Even if the worst happens and I die... I'll just loop again!
My consciousness will go back in time and "transfer" to my past self!
But... what if you die first?
For some reason, you came with me when I looped... But when I die, if you're already dead, will you be able to come with me?
If that's impossible... where will I be able to meet you next!?
Will I have to wait until the fireworks on the 24th? No... there are even worse scenarios to consider...!!
What worst scenarios?
(The scenario where I never get to see you again...!!)
...Anyway!!
Going forward in eliminating the Shadows, your combat strength is equal to a hundred men!! I want to avoid the risk of losing you!
You're talking too much! Stop being so objective and just say what you really feel!!!
W-Well... It's not like... That was my genuine feeling from the bottom of my heart, but... I... In other words...
Ushio! That promise we made as kids... I consider it to be for life!
…A promise?
I will protect you. This time for sure...!!
Shinpei… that's…
I don't really get it, but...
I'm absolutely not letting you die anymore!! I feel the same way as Shinpei!!
Will ya let him protect ya, Ushio?
Wh-Whatever... Do what ya want!?
(Having confirmed our intentions for when push comes to shove, we proceeded deeper into the underground bunker...)
Bwaaaaahhhhh!!?
What's wrong, Sou!!
B-Bugs...!
Whoa! Looking closely, there are a ton of camel crickets...
I-I brought bug spray!! Kill them with this, Shinpei! Kill them~~!!
Calm down! They're just gross, they aren't harmful... They're just drawn to the light.
What, Sou, you hate bugs? You've got a cute side to you~~.
Gyaaaah! Don't hold it barehanded!! Don't bring it near meee!!
You two. There's a black, human-shaped stain on that wall over there.
Wh-what…!
Wait, I'll check it.
...This is really old. In the past, here... someone was erased by a Shadow...?
Huh?!
A m-mouse... Don't scare me like that...
It's here...
Just past the corner that mouse turned... I sense a Shadow's presence...!!
...Has it noticed us!?
I don't know... I'll go take a look!
Wait, Ushio! I told you, I'll go...!!
Be careful…
Yeah…
(...I have the nail gun ready. Three shots of this into its shadow...!! I'll shoot three shots into its shadow and seal its movements!)
Is it there!?
It's here...! Just one of them, though...!
(It's like a baby... It's catching mice with its hands...!)
(That light just now... is it "eating"...!?)
Stray…
A stray? The ones Shadow Shiori mentioned...!!
Yeah... Also, it looks like the one I defeated.
These guys might be... old Shadows. Shadows that have deteriorated over time and gone feral, losing their human form... or something...
Hey, Ushio! If you can sense the presence of Shadows. Doesn't that mean it can also sense that you're nearby!?
...That's what it should mean, but...
Isn't that bad!?
I wonder... Did you see its face? It doesn't have eyes or ears.
It can't see or hear anything right now. That much is certain.
(Looking completely defenseless... is it a trap!? Is it pretending not to notice to lure us in? Or...)
Should we do it!? Shinpei...!!
(Thinking about it won't give me an answer! Right now, I just have to act...!!)
Sou, Ushio!
Yeah!
I'm ready whenever! Just like we planned!
Preemptive strike...!!
(First, I'll shoot three nails into its shadow and seal its movements...!!)
(Then Ushio will safely deliver the finishing blow. Sou is backup.)
(First, I'll see how it reacts. I'll toss a pebble near the Shadow...)
(No reaction... Does it seriously not have eyes or ears!)
(Then, I'll steady my breathing...)
(And aim the light and nail gun at the Shadow... once again!)
(Illuminated by the light... Its shadow is stretching across the wall behind it...)
That's proof it hasn't noticed us. Even though it's being targeted, it's just letting itself be affected by the light...
(Good... The bigger the target, the better...!!)
(Now... I just need to remember what Nezu-san told me...!)
The nail gun has a safety mechanism that prevents nails from firing unless the tip is pressed against the target, but...
I modified this one so you can "shoot" nails like bullets.
However, since it doesn't have a long enough barrel, the nails' "trajectory" scatters, and the grouping performance is extremely poor.
To hit accurately, the range is probably about 1 to 2 meters.
It's a projectile weapon, but consider it a close-range weapon. Draw them in close before you shoot...!!
(It's about 5 meters to the wall... Too far...!! I want to get closer... just a few more steps forward...!!)
(The closer I get! The bigger the shadow should become!!)
Oyaaaaaaaa!!
(!!? It noticed me!!)
(The Shadow is coming at me!!)
(Should I shoot!? But not from this distance! I need to draw it in closer...!?)
(...Is this the time to be hesitating, me!! If I don't shoot right now, who knows how the Shadow will attack...!)
(What do I do... what do I do...!!)
Aaaaaaaaaaah!!
(I have no choice but to shoot!!)
Giiii!!!
(That thing...!! It jumped to the side and pulled its shadow back!!)
(Damn it...! Now that it's come to this... it's eat or be eaten! I'll get close and shoot...!!)
Oyaaaaa!!
(At this distance…!!)
Yah!!
!!? I-It jumped over me!?
(That thing... it ignored me...)
(No way... its target wasn't me, but the two behind me...!!)

Ushio!!
Sou!!
I know!! Ushio, stay back!!
Only if you don't act pathetic!!
Ohhhhh!!!

This kind of thing…
Think of it as a baseball!
Shaa!! Clean hit!!
…!? Wh-What is this...?!
(It flattened out the moment I hit it and stuck to the bat...!?)
Oya... Oyaaa...
Watch out!! It's materializing!?
Guh!?
(His mask broke...!! Sou's gonna get killed!!?)
(Calm down!! Look at the big picture! Look at the big picture!! If I don't do it now, when will I?!)
(…Are you getting scared now? You're shaking…)
(You'll never hit anything like this, no matter how many times you shoot. Relax. Focus.)
(Imagine pulling just your consciousness out of your stiff body.)
(It's the same thing you've always done since that day.)
(Yeah… that's right… Ever since… Mom and Dad died…)
(Looking at it like this…)
(It all seems like nothing. The pain, the sadness, the fear… You've overcome everything like this, haven't you?)
(It's a piece of cake now. Look, right in front of you—)
Uwaaaaaaah!!!
Ooryaaaaah!!!!
Bugi!!
(She cut it with her hair blade…!!)
Giyeeeee...!!
(This is bad!! The Shadow is escaping!!)
(This time… hit!!!)
(I did it…!! I pinned it to Sou's protector!!)
Sou!!
Yeah!! Ushio, do it!!
Leave it to me!! Eat this!!!
Bugi...!?
W-We did it…!!
Yeah… thank goodness…
I'm sorry… if I had just shot sooner…!
I was overthinking it… What if I missed, what if I hit Sou…
And because of that, I put you in danger, Sou. …I'm really sorry.
Nah, don't worry about it! If I were in your shoes, I don't know if I could've shot either…
Treat me a little rougher next time. You don't need to worry about hitting me.
I'm not so fragile that you need to worry about me!
(Alright…!! I pinned it to the protector!!)
…O-Oa… Gya!

Sou!!
Take off the protector and throw it!!
G-Got it...!! Uwoooohhh!!
Not bad! Both of you!!
…Hmph!!
Bugi!!
We did it, Shinpei!!! We got it!!
Yeah!!
Y-Yeah…
(We beat it… with the power of all three of us…!!)
Hell yeah!!!
Sorry, Sou… I shot you too. Is your stomach okay!?
It's nothing! Thanks to the protector, I'm perfectly fine.
I was sweating bullets for a second there, but you stayed super calm, Shinpei!
Well, I knew it all along! I knew you'd definitely hit it, Shinpei!
Huh, why…
Last night, you were practicing without sleeping a wink! I was watching you!

Huh!?
You were awake this whole time!?
You should've said something… how embarrassing…
Hehe!

…Ow!
My…arm…
What's wrong?
…It's too early to relax! The Shadow presence I felt earlier hasn't disappeared.
Even though it's not close, it feels really bad… It's like hearing nails on a chalkboard from far away…
Are you serious… what the hell…
Can you tell which direction the "sound" is coming from?
That way…!! I think it's left at that corner.
Alright.
Hey!? Shinpei!!
That guy's crazy… He's heading straight for danger without hesitating at all!
…Because he's seen it. The future that will happen if we do nothing…
You want to protect Mio too, right?
Of course I do! I'd put my life on the line for her!!!
Then you don't have time to be scared! The only way is forward!!
Yeah!!
…The wound I got from Shadow Mio… I printed an arm from Ushio's data, but is it just for show!?
The damage my main body took hasn't healed…
Hey, Shinpei!
Hm?
Quick question. Can't Ushio copy the nail gun? If she copied it, we'd have two, right?
Of course I tried… using her hair.
The result was "it copied"! But it didn't work just like that.
According to Ushio, even if she copies a "machine," as long as the original exists, it's just a fake that looks like it.
So, to make it work, you need to erase the original.
I see… So we can't multiply them!
For things like the "key" or "swimsuit" from earlier, where just the shape is enough, a fake is fine.
But for things that use electricity or gas to operate, it seems you have to erase the original. I already tested this with the "remote control" in my room.
Also… she can print small things onto her hair, but for a bed, she has to transform her whole body.
Something as big as a bookshelf was impossible to print.
I see… So, what about that nail gun in the end?
Ah… This is a "<color=#GF_TIPS_079>copy</color>"! The "original" I got from Nezu-san has already been erased.
The benefits of a copy are huge. Even if we run out of nails, gas, or charge, if Ushio "prints" the original data, it goes back to full.
S-Seriously?! That's amazing…
So from this bat, you can make a bat that can be fixed even if it breaks!
Yeah… I'd like to copy it for you, but sorry… Due to my "capacity" limit, I can't do any more—
Wh-What was that!?
A gunshot…!?

Hey, Shinpei!!
Over here, there's an open area ahead!!

Let's go…
Be careful…!
